events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the mistracking diagnosis (off-center loading + skewed idler) is being investigated on a live belt with apparent guard removal/bypass and no lockout/tagout during adjustments — a direct OSHA 1910.212 nip-point violation. Decision is `fail`, risk `high`, with immediate controls of LOTO before touching idlers/tracking hardware, guard restoration or CEMA-specified standoff distance for live observation, and correction of the loading alignment and idler skew before returning to service.
